article_title: Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers
text: The remedies and penalties provided in this code for a violation of this article are cumulative to the remedies and penalties provided by other laws.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 1. Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers [11700 - 11740]
##### § 11740

The remedies and penalties provided in this code for a violation of this article are cumulative to the remedies and penalties provided by other laws.

*(Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 407, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 2003.)*

subsections.text: The remedies and penalties provided in this code for a violation of this article are cumulative to the remedies and penalties provided by other laws.
